sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁנאצּר

Transliteration: shen'atstsar

Phonetic: shen-ats-tsar'

BDB Definition:

Shenazar = "splendid leader"
  1. a Judaite of the royal line, son or grandson of king Jehoiachin of Judah and uncle of Zerubbabel

Origin: apparently of Babylonian origin

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
